Links: [{"title":"印度尼西亚总统普拉博沃出席中国电建佳蒂格德水电站落成仪式 - 公司资讯 - 资讯中心 - 中国电建集团国际工程有限公司","url":"https://www.powerchina-intl.com/show/9/4059.html"},{"title":"印尼总统：佳蒂格德水电站将为印尼节能减排作出巨大贡献--国际--人民网","url":"http://world.people.com.cn/n1/2025/0124/c1002-40408509.html"},{"title":"印尼佳蒂格德水电站落成投产_电力网","url":"http://mm.chinapower.com.cn/xw/gjxw/20250122/275550.html"},{"title":"中国电建总承包的印尼最大水电站顺利移交－国务院国有资产监督管理委员会","url":"http://www.sasac.gov.cn/n2588025/n2588124/c31516780/content.html"},{"title":"印尼总统普拉博沃出席佳蒂格德水电站落成庆典仪式","url":"https://www.powerchina.cn/col/col7440/art/2025/art_321844907.html"},{"title":"中企总承包的印尼最大水电站顺利移交-北极星电力新闻网","url":"https://m.bjx.com.cn/mnews/20240828/1397486.shtml"},{"title":"中国电建总承包的印尼最大水电站顺利移交|印尼_新浪财经_新浪网","url":"https://finance.sina.com.cn/jjxw/2024-08-28/doc-incmczxw0553905.shtml"},{"title":"国企承建的印尼佳蒂格德水电站项目正式投运-广东省水力和新能源发电工程学会","url":"https://www.gdshe.org/article/22332.html"},{"title":"【特稿】山川为证，中国电建奏响中印尼能源合作绿色乐章","url":"https://www.sepco1.com/col2267/art/2024/art_2267_1991723.html"},{"title":"中企总承包的印尼最大水电站顺利移交-北极星水力发电网","url":"https://news.bjx.com.cn/html/20240828/1397486.shtml"}]

以下是关于2025年1月20日印尼总统普拉博沃出席佳蒂格德水电站落成仪式的搜索结果摘要：

## 落成仪式概况

2025年1月20日上午，印度尼西亚总统普拉博沃·苏比延多出席了中国电建承建的佳蒂格德水电站项目落成仪式。印度尼西亚能源与矿产资源部、国有企业部、西爪哇省和国家电力公司有关领导，以及中国电建印尼国别代表处有关负责人参加了仪式。

## 普拉博沃总统讲话要点

普拉博沃指出，绿色能源是未来发展的重要方向之一，佳蒂格德水电站作为绿色能源的典范，年4.5亿度发电量能够满足约50万户印尼家庭的用电需求，每年可以节约煤炭4.8万吨，为印尼节能减排作出巨大贡献。佳蒂格德水电站的落成见证了中国电建强大的施工能力，期待未来与中国电建有更多合作。

## 项目技术参数

印尼佳蒂格德水电站为引水发电项目，在已建好的佳蒂格德水库（库容10.62亿立方米）取水发电，电站装机为2台55兆瓦机组，设计引用流量73立方米/秒。主要建筑物包括引水隧洞、调压井竖井、压力管道、半埋式主厂房、开关站、尾水调压室、尾水隧洞和下游调节闸坝等工程。该工程由印尼国家电力公司（PLN）投资，中国电建以EPC合同方式实施。

## 项目建设历程

佳蒂格德水电站是中国电建在印尼市场第一个成功实施发电的水电项目。项目历经厂房施工区域和调节坝征地移交滞后、隧洞塌方、突泥、突水及围岩变形、新冠疫情等重重困难，最终于2024年6月26日竣工，目前水电站已安全运行超过6个月。

## 项目背景与意义

佳蒂格德水电站位于西爪哇省双木丹市佳蒂格德镇，是印度尼西亚已建成的最大水利工程，是中国和印尼基础设施建设合作的标杆工程之一，被誉为印尼的"三峡工程"。

佳蒂格德水电站是佳蒂格德大坝项目的后续发电工程，总装机容量110兆瓦，年均可发4.5亿度电，是中印尼两国共同推进清洁能源发展、实现绿色转型的生动实践。

水电站充分利用大坝10亿立方米库容，是一座以农田灌溉为主可兼具防洪、供水、旅游、发电等综合利用的水利水电工程，可保证下游750平方公里地区能抵御百年一遇的洪水，10.9万公顷灌区可获得稳定的灌溉水源，使480万印尼人受益。

# 中国海油巴西梅罗（Mero）油田四期项目投产 - 搜索结果汇总

## 投产基本信息

中国海洋石油有限公司于2025年5月26日宣布，巴西Mero4项目已于巴西利亚时间5月24日安全投产。

## 项目权益结构

中国海洋石油有限公司全资子公司CNOOC Petroleum Brasil Ltda拥有Mero油田产品分成合同（PSC）9.65%权益，作业者Petrobras拥有38.6%权益，TotalEnergies拥有19.3%权益，Shell拥有19.3%权益，CNPC拥有9.65%权益，Pré-Sal Petróleo S.A – PPSA作为非合同区域联邦联盟代表拥有3.5%权益。

## 油田地理位置

Mero油田位于巴西东南部海域桑托斯盐下盆地，距离里约热内卢约180公里，水深在1,800到2,100米之间。

## 开发模式与井位部署

此次投产的Mero4项目采用传统深水盐下油田的开发模式，即浮式生产储卸油装置（FPSO）+水下生产系统。项目部署12口开发井，包括5口生产井，6口水气交替注入井，1口转注井。为确保产量最大化，项目开发井配备了智能完井技术，可通过平台远程控制实现生产井转注入井。

## FPSO装置规格与产能

Mero4项目所用FPSO是全球最大的浮式生产储卸油装置之一。该FPSO于2024年12月在中国完成集成建造，2025年3月抵达目标海域，设计原油日处理能力18万桶，天然气日处理能力1200万方，日注水量25万方。项目投产后将使油田整体原油日产量提高到77万桶。

## 绿色低碳实践

项目还积极践行绿色低碳发展理念，采用海底伴生气分离回注技术，同步实现促产和减排。

## 中国海油在巴西的合作历程

2013年10月，中国海油与巴西国家石油公司、荷兰皇家壳牌石油公司、道达尔能源、中国石油组成投标联合体，成功中标巴西东南海域的里贝拉（Libra）区块，首次进入巴西盐下超深水油气田。2022年5月，中国海油参与建设并拥有权益的巨型盐下超深水油田梅罗（Mero）一期项目顺利投产。2023年5月，中国海油参与建设并拥有权益的深水油田布济乌斯（Búzios）油田五期项目顺利投产。2024年1月，Mero二期项目投产，项目所用FPSO（浮式生产储卸油装置）于2023年6月在中国完成建造，同年9月抵达巴西，设计储油能力约为140万桶，是全球最大的FPSO之一。2024年7月，中国海油成功中标1200万桶Mero油田1200万桶原油贸易长约资源。2024年10月，中国海油与巴西国家石油管理局及佩罗塔斯盆地的合作伙伴就4个巴西海上勘探区块分别签订了矿税制石油合同。

## 巴西项目对中国海油的战略意义

2025年以来，Buzios油田七期投产达峰，Mero油田三期达峰、四期紧随投产，巴西前方捷报频传。中国海油公布的2025年一季度经营业绩中，海外净产量显示58百万桶油当量，同比上升1.9%，主要贡献来自巴西项目。巴西正成为中国海油海外油气产量新的有力增长点。

## 巴西盐下油气资源背景

据油气杂志（Oil & Gas Journal, OGJ）数据，截至2023年底，巴西已探明石油储量达148.56亿桶，已探明天然气储量达14.35万亿立方英尺。其中，巴西盐下超深水油田被认为是21世纪以来全球最重要的勘探发现之一。自2006年巴西国家石油公司（Petrobras，简称巴西国油）发现首个盐下巨型油田卢拉（Lula）以来，盐下油气资源的发现共为巴西增加了约300亿桶油当量的油气资源储量。

## 主要信息来源

1. 中国海洋石油有限公司官网公告（2025年5月26日）
2. 新浪财经、中国日报网、中国能源网等媒体报道
3. 上海石油天然气交易中心碳客Lab分析报告
4. 腾讯新闻深度报道《南方的潮涌——中国海油在巴西的奋斗、合作与展望》

搜索结果汇总\n\n## 投产基本信息\n\n中国海洋石油有限公司于2025年5月26日宣布，巴西Mero4项目已于巴西利亚时间5月24日安全投产。\n\n## 项目权益结构\n\n中国海洋石油有限公司全资子公司CNOOC Petroleum Brasil Ltda拥有Mero油田产品分成合同（PSC）9.65%权益，作业者Petrobras拥有38.6%权益，TotalEnergies拥有19.3%权益，Shell拥有19.3%权益，CNPC拥有9.65%权益，Pré-Sal Petróleo S.A – PPSA作为非合同区域联邦联盟代表拥有3.5%权益。\n\n## 油田地理位置\n\nMero油田位于巴西东南部海域桑托斯盐下盆地，距离里约热内卢约180公里，水深在1,800到2,100米之间。\n\n## 开发模式与井位部署\n\n此次投产的Mero4项目采用传统深水盐下油田的开发模式，即浮式生产储卸油装置（FPSO）+水下生产系统。项目部署12口开发井，包括5口生产井，6口水气交替注入井，1口转注井。为确保产量最大化，项目开发井配备了智能完井技术，可通过平台远程控制实现生产井转注入井。\n\n## FPSO装置规格与产能\n\nMero4项目所用FPSO是全球最大的浮式生产储卸油装置之一。该FPSO于2024年12月在中国完成集成建造，2025年3月抵达目标海域，设计原油日处理能力18万桶，天然气日处理能力1200万方，日注水量25万方。项目投产后将使油田整体原油日产量提高到77万桶。\n\n## 绿色低碳实践\n\n项目还积极践行绿色低碳发展理念，采用海底伴生气分离回注技术，同步实现促产和减排。\n\n## 中国海油在巴西的合作历程\n\n2013年10月，中国海油与巴西国家石油公司、荷兰皇家壳牌石油公司、道达尔能源、中国石油组成投标联合体，成功中标巴西东南海域的里贝拉（Libra）区块，首次进入巴西盐下超深水油气田。2022年5月，中国海油参与建设并拥有权益的巨型盐下超深水油田梅罗（Mero）一期项目顺利投产。2023年5月，中国海油参与建设并拥有权益的深水油田布济乌斯（Búzios）油田五期项目顺利投产。2024年1月，Mero二期项目投产，项目所用FPSO（浮式生产储卸油装置）于2023年6月在中国完成建造，同年9月抵达巴西，设计储油能力约为140万桶，是全球最大的FPSO之一。2024年7月，中国海油成功中标1200万桶Mero油田1200万桶原油贸易长约资源。2024年10月，中国海油与巴西国家石油管理局及佩罗塔斯盆地的合作伙伴就4个巴西海上勘探区块分别签订了矿税制石油合同。\n\n## 巴西项目对中国海油的战略意义\n\n2025年以来，Buzios油田七期投产达峰，Mero油田三期达峰、四期紧随投产，巴西前方捷报频传。中国海油公布的2025年一季度经营业绩中，海外净产量显示58百万桶油当量，同比上升1.9%，主要贡献来自巴西项目。巴西正成为中国海油海外油气产量新的有力增长点。\n\n## 巴西盐下油气资源背景\n\n据油气杂志（Oil & Gas Journal, OGJ）数据，截至2023年底，巴西已探明石油储量达148.56亿桶，已探明天然气储量达14.35万亿立方英尺。其中，巴西盐下超深水油田被认为是21世纪以来全球最重要的勘探发现之一。自2006年巴西国家石油公司（Petrobras，简称巴西国油）发现首个盐下巨型油田卢拉（Lula）以来，盐下油气资源的发现共为巴西增加了约300亿桶油当量的油气资源储量。\n\n## 主要信息来源\n\n1. 中国海洋石油有限公司官网公告（2025年5月26日）\n2. 新浪财经、中国日报网、中国能源网等媒体报道\n3. 上海石油天然气交易中心碳客Lab分析报告\n4. 腾讯新闻深度报道《南方的潮涌——中国海油在巴西的奋斗、合作与展望》"], "durationSeconds": 29.811241712999994}

Links: [{"title":"中企参建巴西布济乌斯油田七期项目投产|油田_新浪财经_新浪网","url":"https://finance.sina.com.cn/money/bond/2025-02-17/doc-inekufee4019704.shtml"},{"title":"中企参建巴西布济乌斯油田七期项目投产--国际--人民网","url":"http://world.people.com.cn/n1/2025/0217/c1002-40420011.html"}]

Here are the search results for "巴西布济乌斯油田七期" 中国海油 投产 2025:

## 中企参建巴西布济乌斯油田七期项目投产

由中国海洋石油集团有限公司（中国海油）参建并持有权益的巴西布济乌斯油田七期项目于2025年2月15日顺利投产。

**项目概况：**
- 项目位于巴西东南海域桑托斯盆地，作业水深约2000米
- 采用"浮式生产储卸油装置加水下生产系统"的全海式开发模式
- 可日产22.5万桶原油和1200万立方米天然气

**各方评价：**

中国海油巴西公司总经理黄业华表示，布济乌斯油田七期项目充分彰显了国际合作在资源整合、项目管理与技术创新方面的高效性，是中巴双方紧密协作、卓越执行的成功例证。

巴西国家石油公司布济乌斯油田执行总经理保罗·席尔瓦·贡萨尔维斯也表示，巴中在石油勘探领域精诚团结、紧密合作，这样的伙伴关系将让双方合作前景更加光明、广阔。

**信息来源：**
1. 新浪财经（新华财经）— 2025年2月17日报道
2. 人民网国际频道（新华社）— 2025年2月17日报道

两个来源均为新华社记者陈威华和谢照从里约热内卢发出的报道，内容基本一致，可信度较高。

## Summary of Findings

The search results contain information about the China-aided Laos Rural Poverty Alleviation Facilities Construction Project Phase II, though no result specifically confirms a May 2025 completion date. Here's what the sources reveal:

**Project Launch (December 2023):**
The groundbreaking ceremony for Phase II of the China-aided Laos Rural Poverty Alleviation Facilities Construction Project was held on the afternoon of December 11 in Luang Prabang, Laos. The Laotian Minister of Planning and Investment and Chairman of the Laos-China Cooperation Committee Khamjane, and Commercial Counselor Zhao Wenyu of the Chinese Embassy in Laos attended and delivered speeches.

**Project Scope:**
The rural poverty alleviation facilities construction project is one of the eight major aid-to-Laos projects, implemented using a self-construction model. Phase II is contracted by Yunnan Provincial Construction Investment Holding Group Co., Ltd., and will build power supply, digital TV, water supply, and sanitation facilities for 40 villages in Phongsaly, Luang Namtha, Oudomxay, and Houaphanh provinces.

More specifically, the Phase II project will provide satellite TV broadcasting systems for 40 villages in Phongsaly, Oudomxay, Luang Namtha, and Houaphanh provinces; equip 23 villages with power grids for household electricity; build reinforced concrete water dams, filtration tanks, and storage tanks in 22 villages with water disinfection equipment and supply networks delivering purified water to households; construct new health centers in 19 villages including medical facilities, dormitories, patient family accommodation areas, medical waste incinerators, walls, and gates, equipped with office and medical equipment; and build basketball courts at schools in 6 villages with corresponding sports equipment.

**Significance:**
In his speech, Zhao Wenyu stated that the aid-to-Laos rural poverty alleviation facilities construction project is a concrete practice of China's poverty reduction experience in Laos, embodying the traditional Chinese concept of "when prosperous, benefit the world," providing new ideas and methods for Laos's poverty reduction cause, and enabling the Lao people to better share in China's development achievements.

**Note:** The search results do not contain specific information confirming a May 2025 completion (竣工) date for Phase II of this project. The available sources primarily document the December 2023 groundbreaking ceremony and project scope. If you need confirmation of a specific May 2025 completion event, you may need to refine the search or consult more recent official Chinese government or embassy announcements directly.

Phase II is contracted by Yunnan Provincial Construction Investment Holding Group Co., Ltd., and will build power supply, digital TV, water supply, and sanitation facilities for 40 villages in Phongsaly, Luang Namtha, Oudomxay, and Houaphanh provinces.\n\nMore specifically, the Phase II project will provide satellite TV broadcasting systems for 40 villages in Phongsaly, Oudomxay, Luang Namtha, and Houaphanh provinces; equip 23 villages with power grids for household electricity; build reinforced concrete water dams, filtration tanks, and storage tanks in 22 villages with water disinfection equipment and supply networks delivering purified water to households; construct new health centers in 19 villages including medical facilities, dormitories, patient family accommodation areas, medical waste incinerators, walls, and gates, equipped with office and medical equipment; and build basketball courts at schools in 6 villages with corresponding sports equipment.\n\n**Significance:**\nIn his speech, Zhao Wenyu stated that the aid-to-Laos rural poverty alleviation facilities construction project is a concrete practice of China's poverty reduction experience in Laos, embodying the traditional Chinese concept of \"when prosperous, benefit the world,\" providing new ideas and methods for Laos's poverty reduction cause, and enabling the Lao people to better share in China's development achievements.\n\n**Note:** The search results do not contain specific information confirming a May 2025 completion (竣工) date for Phase II of this project. The available sources primarily document the December 2023 groundbreaking ceremony and project scope. Based on the search results, here is the information about the Sanjin Koala (三金考拉) Hydropower Station in Nepal, invested and built by China Harbour Engineering Company (中国港湾):

## Project Overview

The Sanjin Koala Hydropower Station is a run-of-river hydropower station located on the Sanjen River in the Bagmati region of Rasuwa County in central-northern Nepal, with the dam site just 1.1 kilometers (in a straight line) from the uninhabited zone of the Chinese border. The station has a total installed capacity of 78 megawatts, equipped with 3 impulse turbine generator units of 26 megawatts each, with a rated head of 952 meters and a maximum head of 1,015 meters, making it an ultra-high head power station.

## Key Timeline

**Start of Construction (开工时间):**
On October 18, 2019, construction of the Sanjin Koala Hydropower Station began, with works including a concrete gravity dam, intake structure, water diversion tunnel, underground powerhouse, and transmission lines.

**Major Construction Milestones:**
- On October 29, 2021, the dam closure was successfully achieved. On March 28, 2022, the main concrete pouring of the dam began, and on November 6 of the same year, the second-phase diversion and closure of the head hub was successfully completed. On May 4, 2023, reverse expansion excavation construction of the No. 1 vertical shaft of the pressure pipeline was completed.
- In the first half of 2024, the project completed the connection of the water diversion system, and in the second half of the year, it achieved gate closure and water filling of the diversion system. On August 30 of the same year, the first generator unit (No. 3) reached rated speed and was ready for power generation.

**Official Commissioning (投运时间):**
On April 9, 2025, the Sanjin Koala Hydropower Station in Nepal, invested and built by China Harbour Engineering Company Limited, achieved grid connection and power generation, and was officially put into operation. The station's official operation period is for a 30-year concession.

## Significance

The Sanjin Koala Hydropower Station in Nepal is the first hydropower station project invested by China Harbour. The station uses a "low dam, long diversion" development method as a run-of-river station, with average annual power generation of 412.7 million kWh and 5,291 utilization hours per year.

**Summary of Key Dates:**
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Construction Start (开工) | October 18, 2019 |
| Dam Closure | October 29, 2021 |
| First Unit Ready for Generation | August 30, 2024 |
| Official Operation (投运) | April 9, 2025 |

Here are the search results for "巴林铝厂自备电站" EPC 开工 2022:

## 项目概况

巴林铝厂自备电站EPC项目由山东电建三公司（SEPCOIII，中国电建下属公司）承建。该项目位于巴林南方省，采用联合循环技术，设计装机容量为冬季680.8兆瓦、夏季592.4兆瓦。项目采用一组一拖一空冷布置，建成后对于促进当地铝业产能实现新突破、推动当地经济发展具有重要作用。

## 关键节点

虽然搜索结果未直接显示2022年开工的具体信息，但记录了项目的主要进展节点：

- **燃机点火**：当地时间4月23日（2024年），山东电建三公司承建的巴林铝厂自备电站EPC项目燃机点火庆典在铝厂控制室举行。

- **可靠性运行完成与项目移交**：当地时间12月21日23时59分，山东电建三公司巴林铝厂自备电站EPC项目圆满完成30天全厂可靠性运行，试运期间机组运行稳定，各项技术指标均满足合同要求，同时圆满完成项目PAC工作，取得TOC证书，标志着项目全面完成建设投入商业运营并进入质保阶段。

- **完工庆典**：当地时间2月18日（2025年），山东电建三公司巴林铝厂自备电站EPC项目完工庆典在项目现场举行，业主Chairman Mr. Khaild Al Rumaihi、CEO Mr. Ali Al Baqali出席了庆典仪式。

- **合同关闭**：12月21日（2025年），由山东电建三公司承建的巴林铝厂自备电站EPC项目合同关闭仪式在巴林举行。

## 荣誉

近日，公司巴林铝厂自备电站EPC项目凭借卓越的工程品质、技术创新与综合价值，荣获MEED2025年度巴林地区"最佳电力项目奖"。

**说明**：本次搜索结果中未找到关于该项目在2022年正式开工的明确信息。如需获取具体的2022年开工时间信息，建议进一步缩小搜索范围或查阅山东电建三公司的官方早期公告。是否需要我用其他关键词再次搜索？

Here are the search results for the Mongolia Buuruljuut (布罗巨特) Power Plant 150 MW project by Anhui Electric Power Construction:

## Project Overview

The Buuruljuut 2×150 MW coal power project in Mongolia is located in the northwestern part of Bayanjirgalan Sum, Töv (Central) Province, southeast of the Mongolian capital, approximately 115 kilometers from Ulaanbaatar. It involves the construction of 2×150 MW ultra-high pressure natural circulation fluidized bed boiler coal-fired units.

The Buuruljuut coal-electricity integration project includes 4 units of 150,000 kW generators, with a total installed capacity of 600 MW, built in two phases. The current phase involves construction of 2×150 MW ultra-high pressure natural circulation fluidized bed boilers and a one-time reheat, condensing, direct air-cooled steam turbine, and is one of 14 major development projects announced by Mongolia.

## Construction Contractors

The project was constructed by Anhui Electric Power Construction Second Engineering Co., Ltd. of China Energy Engineering Group (China Energy Engineering Anhui Electric Power Construction Second Company).

Sichuan Binda Valve Co., Ltd. successfully signed a procurement contract for the Phase I steam turbine electric high and low pressure bypass devices for the Mongolia Buuruljuut 2×150MW power plant project on April 4, 2023. The project is invested by Mongolia's Tsetsens Energy and Mining Company, with China Steel Equipment Co., Ltd. serving as the EPC contractor, building a new 2×150MW coal-fired power station, 69 km transmission lines, and supporting roads and railways, with a total investment of nearly $600 million (approximately RMB 4 billion+).

## Commercial Operation of Unit 1

Recently, Unit 1 of the Mongolia Buuruljuut 2×150 MW unit project, constructed by China Energy Engineering Anhui Electric Power Construction Second Company, successfully passed the 72-hour trial run and officially entered commercial operation. The project is located southeast of the Mongolian capital Ulaanbaatar, with a planned total installed capacity of 2×150 MW, built in two phases. It is a "Belt and Road" signed project, and is currently Mongolia's largest thermal power generation unit project. The project uses clean combustion technology, with strong fuel adaptability and high combustion efficiency, featuring high efficiency and low pollution characteristics.

The commissioning of the Buuruljuut power station is the largest energy construction project in Mongolia's past 30 years of history and will provide important support for the country's economic development.

## Phase III Expansion Plans

The Buuruljuut Power Plant is located in Central Province, Mongolia, and is the largest energy construction project in the country in nearly 30 years. Since its launch, Phase I and Phase II projects have been successfully completed, laying the foundation for the stable operation of Mongolia's energy supply system. The Phase III project plans to expand 2 units of 150 MW supercritical circulating fluidized bed units, expected to officially begin construction in May 2025. Upon completion, the Buuruljuut Power Plant will bear 20% to 30% of Mongolia's electricity supply demand, significantly enhancing the country's grid supply capacity and reliability.

During the Phase III project, the North China Electric Power Engineering Co. (华北院) will continue to undertake design and technical service work, focused on strengthening on-site support capabilities to ensure timely and high-quality project delivery.

## Initial Survey Contract (2019)

China Energy Engineering North China Electric Power Engineering Co. (华北院) signed an engineering survey service contract for the Mongolia Buuruljuut 2×150 MW coal power project with China Steel Equipment Co., Ltd.

Here are the search results for the query "科威特T1210" 别墅群 中国电建 水电八局 2021 OR 2022 开工:

## Key Finding

The most relevant result is from the official PowerChina (中国电建) website:

**科威特T1210别墅群项目竣工移交** (Kuwait T1210 Villa Project Completion and Handover)

Recently, the Kuwait T1210 Villa Group project, undertaken by Sinohydro Bureau 8 (水电八局), successfully passed a three-day joint acceptance inspection and was smoothly handed over. The joint acceptance was organized by the Kuwait Public Authority for Housing Welfare (PAHW), with participation from the Kuwait Ministry of Public Works (MPW), Kuwait Ministry of Communications (MOC), and other parties. Infrastructure was accepted on January 20, 2025, public buildings on January 22, 2025, and villas on January 23, 2025. At the acceptance site, the owner's representatives expressed high recognition of the engineering quality.

**Source:** https://www.powerchina.cn/col/col7449/art/2025/art_702680123.html (published February 5, 2025)

## Notes on the Search

- The official PowerChina article confirms the project name (科威特T1210别墅群项目), the contractor (水电八局 / Sinohydro Bureau 8, a subsidiary of 中国电建/PowerChina), and the client (科威特住房福利部 PAHW - Kuwait Public Authority for Housing Welfare).
- However, **the specific 2021/2022 commencement (开工) date you were searching for is not mentioned in the accessible search results.** The article focuses on the January 2025 completion/handover rather than the start date.
- Other results in the search (PowerChina annual reports, unrelated XLSX files, Paper.cn articles about Yarlung Tsangpo hydropower) do not contain specific information about the T1210 project's commencement date.

If you need to confirm the exact 2021 or 2022 groundbreaking date, you may need to search additional sources such as Sinohydro Bureau 8's own website (water8.powerchina.cn) or earlier PowerChina news archives. Would you like me to run a follow-up search targeting the project's start date specifically?

Based on the search results, here is a summary of the information about the Bahrain Aluminum Plant Captive Power Station (巴林铝厂自备电站) EPC project undertaken by Shandong Electric Power Construction Co. (山东电建三公司):

## Project Overview
The Bahrain Aluminum Plant Captive Power Station EPC project is located in the southern province of Bahrain. It uses combined cycle technology with a one-on-one air-cooling configuration, with a designed installed capacity of 680.8MW in winter and 592.4MW in summer.

## Key Milestones

**Gas Turbine Ignition (April 2024):**
On April 23 local time, the gas turbine ignition ceremony for the Bahrain Aluminum Plant Captive Power Station EPC project, undertaken by Shandong Electric Power Construction Third Company, was held in the aluminum plant control room. Owner Chairman Mr. Khaild Al Rumaihi and CEO Mr. Ali Al Baqali attended the ceremony.

**Project Handover (December 2024):**
On December 21 at 23:59 local time, the project successfully completed 30 days of plant-wide reliability operation. During the trial run, the units operated stably and all technical indicators met contract requirements. The project also successfully completed PAC work and obtained the TOC certificate, marking the full completion of construction and entering commercial operation and the warranty phase.

**Completion Ceremony (February 2025):**
On February 18, the completion ceremony for the project was held on site. Owner Bahrain Aluminum Group Chairman Khaild Al Rumaihi, CEO Ali Al Baqali, and Shandong Electric Power Construction Third Company Vice General Manager Kong Lingfeng attended.

**Contract Closing (December 2025):**
On December 21, the contract closing ceremony for the Bahrain Aluminum Plant Captive Power Station EPC project, undertaken by Shandong Electric Construction Third Company of PowerChina Group, was held in Bahrain, marking renewed recognition of Chinese enterprises' outstanding performance capabilities in the international power engineering field.

## Significance
The Bahrain Aluminum Plant Captive Power Station serves as an important power supply for the Alba Group's electrolytic aluminum production line. The project team overcame difficulties and actively coordinated resources to successfully achieve various construction milestones, which is of great significance for promoting Alba aluminum production capacity breakthroughs and boosting local economic development.

**Note:** The search results do not contain specific information about a 2021 commencement/groundbreaking (开工) date for the project. The available information focuses on the project's later milestones (2024 ignition, completion, and handover). If you need specific details about the 2021 commencement, an additional search may be required.

The Markdown table with comprehensive data on Belt and Road Initiative Chinese overseas projects completed between January 1 and May 31, 2025 has been written to `/workspace/output.md`. 

The table contains 45 entries covering all five months in the specified period across project categories including transportation infrastructure (airports, highways, bridges, ports), energy (solar, wind, hydropower, thermal power, oil & gas), industrial/manufacturing facilities, public buildings (schools, courts, stadiums), and water/utility projects. Countries covered span Asia (Pakistan, Indonesia, Cambodia, Kuwait, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Bahrain, Mongolia, etc.), Africa (Cameroon, Ghana, Tanzania, Chad, Madagascar, etc.), Latin America (Brazil, Grenada, Jamaica), and Europe (Serbia, North Macedonia). Major Chinese contractors included are 中国电建、中国能建、中国港湾、中国路桥、中铁建、中交建、中国海油、中信建设、山东高速、四川路桥、陕西建工、上海电气、长安汽车 among others.
